overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a foggy mountain cliffside path and entering a stone tunnel. The atmosphere transitions from misty outdoor dawn lighting to dim torch-lit underground interiors, featuring detailed stone architecture and atmospheric fog effects.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the narrow mountain path beside a rocky cliff face

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff wall running alongside the path
narrow winding dirt trail along the mountainside
scattered evergreen trees on the mountain slope
fog-covered mountain terrain descending into valley
large boulders and rock formations along the cliff

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a foggy mountain trail hugging a steep cliff face. The path is narrow and winding, with sparse pine trees visible through the mist on the left slope. The atmosphere is quiet and isolated, with natural dawn light diffused through heavy fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic stone tunnel entrance with archway

events.description: approaching the large stone tunnel entrance carved into the mountain cliff
entering the tunnel archway, ambient light shifts from foggy natural to dim interior shadows

agents.ego_description: Geralt approaching the tunnel entrance and passing a stationary guard posted at the threshold

notable_agents.action: armored guard wearing a ram-horned helmet standing at the tunnel entrance holding a weapon

entered.detail: large arched stone doorway carved into the mountain rock
heavy stone blocks forming the tunnel portal with weathered texture

segments.scene_description: The path leads to a massive stone tunnel entrance carved into the cliff. As Geralt approaches, the foggy outdoor light gives way to the shadowy interior. A guard in distinctive ram-horned armor stands watch at the threshold as Geralt passes through the archway into the mountain.

scene_state.functional_zone: torch-lit underground tunnel with wooden support beams

events.description: passing wall-mounted torches casting warm orange light on the stone walls

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking deeper into the tunnel toward a distant light source at the far end

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone walls of the underground passage
heavy timber beams supporting the tunnel ceiling
burning torches mounted on the walls providing warm illumination
bright light visible at the far end of the tunnel

segments.scene_description: Inside the tunnel, the environment is dimly lit by flickering wall torches. Wooden beams support the stone ceiling, and the floor is paved with rough stone tiles. Geralt proceeds toward a bright exit visible in the distance, the warm torchlight contrasting with the cool foggy exterior left behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty mountain cliffside into the dim, torch-lit depths of a stone tunnel. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow, winding trail where sparse pine trees are shrouded in heavy dawn fog. As the path leads forward, the diffused outdoor light gives way to a massive stone archway carved into the cliff, where a guard in ram-horned armor stands watch at the threshold. The scene then shifts into the shadowy interior of the mountain, transitioning from the cool mist to an environment lit by flickering wall torches and supported by heavy wooden beams. Finally, the camera proceeds across rough stone tiles, moving deeper into the tunnel toward a bright exit visible in the distance.
